nodes.label_negative: AI providing incorrect or incomplete explanations

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding
nodes.grounding_span: understanding parts of the research that I myself don't know very well

nodes.label: Preparation for high-stakes scrutiny
nodes.grounding_span: provide great practice before going up against an IRB

nodes.label: Positive valuation of AI for literature screening
nodes.grounding_span: AI proved valuable to help start to conduct research

nodes.label: Trust in AI for concept explanation
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time, receive a very correct answer

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for experimental design

nodes.label: Preference for traditional tools over AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: the switch to AI has not been needed as much in that field

nodes.label: Desire for AI to provide deeper critiques
Iterative verification — uses AI as first pass then validates manually
nodes.grounding_span: I would still read the article myself after

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool selection — chooses tools based on consistency and repeatability needs
nodes.grounding_span: We liked the consistency that the apps provided
